Interface ProofOblInput

All Known Subinterfaces:
ContractPO, InfFlowCompositePO, InfFlowLeafPO, InfFlowPO, IPersistablePO
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractInfFlowPO, AbstractOperationPO, AbstractPO, BlockExecutionPO, DependencyContractPO, FunctionalBlockContractPO, FunctionalLoopContractPO, FunctionalOperationContractPO, InfFlowContractPO, KeYUserProblemFile, LoopInvExecutionPO, ProgramMethodPO, ProgramMethodSubsetPO, ProofStarter.UserProvidedInput, SymbolicExecutionPO, TacletProofObligationInput, WdFunctionalBlockContractPO, WellDefinednessPO
public interface ProofOblInput
Represents something that produces an input proof obligation for the prover. A .key file or a proof obligation generated from a CASE tool may be instances.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    KeYJavaType
    getContainerType()
    Returns the KeYJavaType in which the proven element is contained in.
    ProofAggregate
    getPO()
    Returns the proof obligation term as result of the proof obligation input.
    boolean
    implies(ProofOblInput po)
    If true, then this PO implies the passed one.
    String
    name()
    Returns the name of the proof obligation input.

    prepareSave(StrategyProperties strategyProperties, Proof proof)
    A way to do some stuff before this obligation get stored by ProofSaver.

  • Method Details

    • name

      String name()
      Returns the name of the proof obligation input.

    • readProblem

      void readProblem() throws ProofInputException
      Throws:
      ProofInputException

    • getPO

      ProofAggregate getPO() throws ProofInputException
      Returns the proof obligation term as result of the proof obligation input. If there is still no input available because nothing has been read yet null is returned.
      Throws:
      ProofInputException

    • implies

      boolean implies(ProofOblInput po)
      If true, then this PO implies the passed one.

    • getContainerType

      KeYJavaType getContainerType()
      Returns the KeYJavaType in which the proven element is contained in.
      Returns:
      The KeYJavaType in which the proven element is contained in or null if not available.

    • prepareSave

      default void prepareSave(StrategyProperties strategyProperties, Proof proof)
      A way to do some stuff before this obligation get stored by ProofSaver.
